translations.### iOS 跨平台帳號密碼整合，加強登入體驗\n\n: ### iOS Cross-Platform Account and Password Integration to Enhance Login Experience
translations.#### 那麼 APP 與 Web 之間是如何相認的呢？\n\n: #### So how do the APP and Web recognize each other?
translations.***⚠️ 因為此讀取方法已在 iOS 14 被標示 Deprecated！**: ***⚠️ This reading method has been marked as Deprecated since iOS 14!***
translations.***⚠️ 此登入無法取代*** *Sign in with Apple（兩個是: ***⚠️ This login cannot replace*** *Sign in with Apple (they are two different things).*
translations.***⚠️ 設定部分一樣要設好 Associated Domains，同前述 P: ***⚠️ The Associated Domains must be properly configured, just like in the Password AutoFill setup mentioned earlier.***
translations.***⚠️*** *另外也不是能讓你在背景偷修改的，每次修改都會跳出提示框提示使: ***⚠️*** *This is also not a way to secretly modify data in the background; every change will trigger a prompt to the user, and the data will only be updated when the user taps "Update Password".*
translations.**1.在專案設定中的「Signing & Capabilities」-&gt;: **1. In the project settings under "Signing & Capabilities" -> top left "+ Capabilities" -> "Associated Domains"**
translations.**3.進入「Certificates, Identifiers & Profi: **3. Go to "Certificates, Identifiers & Profiles" -> "Identifiers" -> find your project -> enable the "Associated Domains" feature**
translations.**account** 指定要新增、修改、刪除的帳號\n: **account** Specifies the account to add, modify, or delete
translations.**account** 指定要查某一個帳號，使用 null 不指定\n: **account** Specify the account to query; use null to not specify any account
translations.**fqdn** 可隨意指定要存入的 domain 不一定要在 `webcred: **fqdn** can be freely set to any domain to store and does not have to be in `webcredentials`
translations.**fqdn** 如果有多個 `webcredentials` domain 可: **fqdn** If there are multiple `webcredentials` domains, you can specify one or use null to not specify any.
translations.- **fqdn** If there are multiple `webcre:
- **fqdn** If there are multiple `webcredentials` domains, you can specify one or use null to specify none.

- **account** Specify the account to query; use null to specify no account.
translations.- **fqdn** can be freely set to any doma:
- **fqdn** can be freely set to any domain to store and does not have to be in `webcredentials`

- **account** Specifies the account to add, modify, or delete

- To delete data, set **password** to **`nil`**

- Processing Logic:

- account exists & password provided = update password

- account exists & password is nil = delete account and password from domain

- account does not exist & password is provided = add account and password to domain
translations.> ***⚠️ The Associated Domains must be p: > ***⚠️ The Associated Domains must be properly configured, just like in the Password AutoFill setup mentioned earlier.***
translations.> ***⚠️ This login cannot replace*** *Si: > ***⚠️ This login cannot replace*** *Sign in with Apple (they are two different things).*
translations.> ***⚠️ This reading method has been mar: > ***⚠️ This reading method has been marked as Deprecated since iOS 14!***
translations.> ***⚠️*** *This is also not a way to se: > ***⚠️*** *This is also not a method to secretly modify data in the background; every change will trigger a prompt to the user, and the data will only be updated when the user taps "Update Password".*
translations.> So you could say it’s an enhanced vers: > So you could say it’s an enhanced version of the Password AutoFill feature!!
translations.> `\"Use ASAuthorizationController to cr: > `"Use ASAuthorizationController to create an ASAuthorizationPasswordRequest (AuthenticationServices framework)"`
translations.Associated Domains！我們在 APP 中指定 Associate: Associated Domains! We specify Associated Domains in the APP and upload the apple-app-site-association file on the website, allowing both sides to recognize each other.
translations.Code 部分，我們只需要將 TextField 設為 ：\n\n: For the code part, we only need to set the TextField to:
translations.Shared Web Credentials 除了能讀取帳號密碼，還能新增帳號密: Shared Web Credentials can not only read account passwords but also add new accounts, modify existing ones, and delete them.
translations.`\"Use ASAuthorizationController to make: `"Use ASAuthorizationController to create an ASAuthorizationPasswordRequest (AuthenticationServices framework)"`
translations.account 不存在＆有帶入 password = 新增 account, p: account does not exist & password is provided = add account and password to domain
translations.account 存在＆password 帶入 nil = 從 domain 刪除: account exists & password is nil = delete account and password from domain
translations.account 存在＆有帶入 password = 修改 password\n: account exists & password provided = update password
translations.不囉唆，先上完成效果圖；第一眼看到可能會以為是 iOS ≥ 11 Passwor: No fuss, here is the final result image first; at first glance, you might think it's the iOS ≥ 11 Password AutoFill feature. However, please take a closer look—the keyboard does not pop up, and I tapped the "Choose Saved Password" button to bring up the account and password selection window.
translations.到如今已經 iOS 14 了，這個功能已經非常常見沒什麼特別的；在 APP 中的: As of iOS 14, this feature has become very common and nothing special; on the app's login page, when the keyboard appears for input, you can quickly select the website version's account credentials, and after selecting, it will auto-fill for a fast login!
translations.前菜 Password AutoFill 介紹完之後，再來進入本篇主題；如何達到: After the appetizer of introducing Password AutoFill, let's move on to the main topic of this article: how to achieve the effect shown in the image.
translations.可能是沒打開自動填寫密碼功能（模擬器預設是關閉），請到「設定」->「密碼」->「: The Password AutoFill feature might be turned off (it's off by default in the simulator). Please go to "Settings" -> "Passwords" -> "AutoFill Passwords" and turn on "AutoFill Passwords".
translations.因為一樣要先設好 Password AutoFill 需要的環境才能使用此「進階: Because you need to set up the environment required for Password AutoFill first before using this "advanced" feature.
translations.在「 **Membership** 」Tab 地方記錄下「 **Team ID*: In the "**Membership**" tab, note down the "**Team ID**".
translations.在同時有網站又有 APP 的服務中最常遇到的問題就是使用者在網站登入註冊過，且有: A common issue for services with both a website and an app is that users have registered and saved their passwords on the website; however, after being guided to install the app, they have to enter their account and password from scratch when logging in, which is very inconvenient. This feature automatically fills the existing account and password stored on the phone into the app associated with the website, speeding up the user login process.
translations.在模擬器上按「Command」+「R」開始錄影，按一下紅點停止錄影；在右下角滑出: Press "Command" + "R" on the simulator to start recording, click the red dot to stop; then right-click the preview thumbnail that slides out at the bottom right and select "Save as Animated GIF" to save as a GIF and directly paste it into the article!
translations.如果是新註冊，密碼確認欄位可使用：\n\n: If it is a new registration, the password confirmation field can use:
translations.如果有使用第三方密碼管理工具(EX: onepass、lastpass)的朋友可: For those using third-party password managers (e.g., 1Password, LastPass), you might notice that while the keyboard's Password AutoFill supports displaying and inputting passwords, they do not appear in AuthenticationServices or SecRequestSharedWebCredential. It is unclear if this functionality can be achieved.
translations.始於 iOS 8.0 只是之前很少看到 APP 使用，早在 Password A: Starting from iOS 8.0, although it was rarely used by apps before, this API could already be used to integrate website account passwords for users to quickly select, even before Password AutoFill was introduced.
translations.將 `TeamID.BundleId` 換成你的專案設定 (ex: TeamID: Replace `TeamID.BundleId` with your project settings (e.g., TeamID = `ABCD`, BundleID = `li.zhgchg.demoapp` => `ABCD.li.zhgchg.demoapp`)
translations.將此檔案上傳到網站 `根目錄` 或 `/.well-known` 目錄下，假設你: Upload this file to the website’s `root directory` or `/.well-known` directory. Assuming your `webcredentials website domain` is set to `google.com`, the file should be accessible at `google.com/apple-app-site-association` or `google.com/.well-known/apple-app-site-association`.
translations.建立一個名為「 **apple-app-site-association** 」: Create a file named "**apple-app-site-association**" (no extension), edit it with a text editor, and enter the following content:
translations.感謝大家閱讀，也感謝 [saiday](https://twitter.com/: Thanks everyone for reading, and thanks to [saiday](https://twitter.com/saiday){:target="_blank"} and StreetVoice for letting me know about this feature XD.
translations.所以可以說是 Password AutoFill 功能的加強版！！\n\n: So you could say it’s an enhanced version of the Password AutoFill feature!!
translations.抑或是該網站沒有已存在的密碼，一樣可在「設定」->「密碼」-> 右上角「+ 新增: Or if there is no existing password for the website, you can still add one by going to "Settings" -> "Passwords" -> "+" in the top right corner -> Add new.
translations.摘錄官方文件，如果是 subdomains 則都須列在 Associated D: Excerpt from the official documentation: if they are subdomains, they must all be listed in the Associated Domains.
translations.效果圖。（你可能有發現跟開始的效果圖不一樣）\n\n: Screenshot. (You might notice it looks different from the initial screenshot)
translations.效果圖，可以看到新的做法在流程上、顯示上都能跟 Sign in with App: Screenshot: You can see that the new approach integrates better with Sign in with Apple both in flow and display.
translations.新增、刪除、編輯的部分使用 `SecAddSharedWebCredential: The add, delete, and edit operations are performed using `SecAddSharedWebCredential`.
translations.既然提到了 Password AutoFill 那就先讓我賣個關子，先介紹 Pa: Since Password AutoFill has been mentioned, let me keep you in suspense for a moment and first introduce Password AutoFill and how to set it up!
translations.最後一個小功能，密碼產生器。\n\n: The last small feature, the password generator.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.此方法僅適用 iOS 8 ~ iOS 14，iOS 13 之後可改用同 **Si: This method only applies to iOS 8 ~ iOS 14. After iOS 13, you can use the same API as **Sign in with Apple** — **AuthenticationServices**.
translations.產生器產生出來的 Password 由英文大小寫及數字並使用「-」組成 (ex:: The password generated by the generator consists of uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and uses "-" as separators (e.g., Jpn-4t2-gaF-dYk).
translations.被 Deprecated 的只有讀取的部分，新增、刪除、編輯的部分都還是照舊能用: Only the reading part has been deprecated; adding, deleting, and editing parts still work as before.
translations.這時候再重 Build & Run APP 後，在輸入帳號時鍵盤上方就會出現同個: At this point, after rebuilding and running the app, saved password options for the same website will appear above the keyboard when entering the account.
translations.這邊有發現如果有設過 universal link `applinks` ，其實: Here, it was found that if the universal link `applinks` is already set, adding the `webcredentials` part is actually not necessary for it to work; however, we will still follow the official documentation to avoid potential issues in the future.
translations.還有 XCode ≥ 12.5 模擬器新增錄影，並支援儲存成 GIF 功能太好用: XCode ≥ 12.5 simulators now support screen recording and saving as GIF, which is super useful!
translations.除 Sign in with Apple 也值得加入的功能\n\n: Features Worth Adding Besides Sign in with Apple
